title: InvocationOutcome
description: Reusable protocol contract for one invocation result.

short_reason.description: One human-readable sentence summarizing why the invocation reached this status. Required (non-empty) for any non-completed status.

return_value.description: Return value from the invocation, if it completed normally.

thrown_error.description: Structured error information, if the invocation failed.

side_effects.description: Side effects observed during the invocation.
